# Support

Where to get help with OILSHIP.

## Documentation

- Protocol overview, mechanism, and SDK reference: https://oilship.xyz/docs/
- Architecture deep dive: [docs/architecture.md](../docs/architecture.md)

## Issues and discussions

- Bugs: [Issue tracker](https://github.com/OilShip/OILSHIP/issues)
- Questions and ideas: [Discussions](https://github.com/OilShip/OILSHIP/discussions)
- Pinned project status: [Issue #3](https://github.com/OilShip/OILSHIP/issues/3)

## Social

- X (Twitter): https://x.com/Oilship2026
- Website: https://oilship.xyz

## Security

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

See [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for the responsible disclosure flow. The
short version: DM the team on X and we will set up a private channel within
48 hours.
